reviews.comment:
Buena atención, lugar cómodo,agradable,cosas ricas saladas y dulces,buenos precios y buen WiFi  y próximamente cajero automático.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, comfortable, pleasant location, delicious savory and sweet items, good prices, good Wi-Fi, and an ATM coming soon.

reviews.comment:
Exelente servicio, baños limpios, Servicompras, área de descanso parquizada. Todo muy bien como acostumbra el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean restrooms, convenience store, landscaped rest area. Everything was great, as usual at ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCZ3NHNzFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El combustible más caro que en las otras estaciones, la atención de los bacheros apurados como que quieren cargarte y que te vayas. Los baños cerrados únicamente el de discapacitados será para limpiar menos. Para controlar el aire tenes que tener aprobado el cursillo de submarinista!!!

(Translated by Google)
Fuel is more expensive than at other stations, and the harried attendants are as if they want to charge you and make you leave. The restrooms are closed, only the one for disabled people is there for less cleaning. To control the air, you need to have passed the scuba diving course!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbk02Rjd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada antes de volver para Bs As. Bien el precio. Muy buena atención los playeros que laburan a full sin descanso en temporada.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop before heading back to Buenos Aires. The price is good. The attendants are very helpful and work tirelessly throughout the season.
